from pathlib import Path


def collect_output_files(base_dir, filenames):
    output_dir = Path(base_dir) / "output"
    return [str(output_dir / name) for name in filenames]


def build_asset_paths(project_root, assets):
    asset_dir = Path(project_root) / "static" / "assets"
    return [asset_dir / asset for asset in assets]


def generate_report_paths(base, report_names):
    report_dir = Path(base) / "reports" / "2024"
    return [report_dir / f"{name}.pdf" for name in report_names]
